name: stat-card
title: Stat Card
description: Dashboard metric card with optional trend indicator.
docs:
# Stat Card
Dashboard metric card with optional trend indicator.
## Import
```tsx
import { StatCard } from "@/components/ui/stat-card";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<StatCard value="12" change="+12.4%" trend="up">Active users</StatCard>
```
## Props
- **label** (string) — default: `"Active users"`: Label
- **value** (string) — default: `"12"`: Value
- **change** (string) — default: `"+12.4%"`: Change
- **trend** (string) — default: `"up"`: Trend
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add stat-card
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/stat-card
```
